title: German Tomato Casserole
description: A hearty German-inspired casserole filled with juicy tomatoes and richly textured ingredients. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Cook the German Sausage in a pan over medium heat until browned.
Add the sliced Mushrooms and chopped Onions to the pan and cook until the vegetables are softened.
Add the sliced Tomatoes, Tomato Paste, and Olive Oil to the pan. Stir well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the Breadcrumbs and Parmesan Cheese on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is golden brown and hot.
